title: audit — entitlements
description: Four entitlements gating audit capture (all tiers baseline), self-service export (Medium+), extended retention (Enterprise), and regulator-shaped cross-application export (Enterprise). Audit is a compliance requirement; the master entitlement is ON for every tier so no tenant ever operates without audit capture.

entitlements.description: Master gate. ON for every tenant because audit is a compliance requirement, not a product feature. The entitlement exists as an emergency kill switch (paired with the `audit.capture` feature flag) — turning it OFF requires an explicit compliance-officer approval + legal review. When OFF, the vendor `AuditableObserver` is unbinded (via the `AuditObserverUnbindingListener`), and modules composing the vendor `Auditable` trait continue to run but never persist audit rows.

Self-service DSAR / regulator export via POST /api/v1/audits/export. Non-Medium+ tenants must open a support ticket for exports. Enterprise additionally has audit_regulator_export (below) for cross-application rollups.

Enables creating AuditRetentionPolicy with retention_years up to 10 (the config-level max_years). Non-Enterprise tenants are locked at the default_years (7). Common triggers: regulator hold, lawsuit hold, HIPAA covered-entity requirement, medical-record retention rule.

Regulator-shaped export via POST /api/v1/platform/audits/export. Cross-application (per tenants.application_id, so this composes across a tenant's activity across every Stackra product they're on). Payload conforms to regulator export schemas (see schemas/audit-regulator-export.schema.json planned Wave 7). Enterprise-only because the payload includes cross-app rollup + a signed manifest hash + a chain-of-custody metadata block that non-Enterprise tenants shouldn't need.
